TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rolando_Blackman, title = Rolando_Blackman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rolando_Blackman} }

S.FORM: Rolando Blackman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Rolando Blackman, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Rolando Blackman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Rolando Blackman, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: rolan*o βlaʦ~ʨkman s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, rolan*o βlaʦ~ʨkman, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
